summary: The stop hook now requests a visible nonce-backed completion-review receipt, validates that receipt against the exact requested artifact set, and links the runtime/docs/ticket contract to targeted proof.

finding_log.summary: Retry continuation messaging still rebuilds required artifacts from current ticket links rather than the persisted exact requested set.
evidence: Receipt enforcement uses persisted completion_review_required_artifacts, but the retry message path still reuses ticket linked_artifacts.
finding_log.next_action: Optional cleanup: align the retry message with persisted completion_review_required_artifacts for perfect contract parity.

rubric_sections.name: code-quality
findings: The receipt gate and tests are localized and explicit.
One retry-message path still duplicates the required artifact contract instead of reusing the persisted set.

rubric_sections.name: integration-readiness
findings: The stop hook now persists the requested artifact set and validates reviewed_artifacts against that exact set.
Receipt request, fail, and pass transitions keep runtime state coherent.

rubric_sections.name: evidence-quality
findings: Targeted proof covers passing, missing, nonce mismatch, stale, failing, substituted reviewed artifact, and request-state persistence paths.
The active ticket now reflects build-phase verification instead of stale planning-only state.
rubric_sections.next_action: Attach this fresh review artifact in the ticket evidence and move to normal documenting/closeout flow.

next_action: Continue the normal documenting or closeout flow; optional cleanup is limited to retry-message contract parity.
